01 //

About

Building Intelligence from Data

I'm a data scientist passionate about uncovering the stories hidden inside complex datasets. My work covers the full ML pipeline — from exploratory analysis and feature engineering, through model development and rigorous evaluation, to visualization and stakeholder-ready output.

I've applied these skills across pharmaceutical analytics, retail demand forecasting, customer segmentation, quality prediction, and real estate market analysis.

  • Predictive modeling — regression, classification, ensemble methods
  • Time series forecasting — ARIMA, SARIMAX, feature engineering
  • Unsupervised learning — K-Means clustering, PCA, dimensionality reduction
  • Exploratory data analysis and statistical modeling
  • Interactive dashboards and data storytelling

Projects

Dashboard · Prediction ↗
Pharma Sales & Price Prediction Dashboard
End-to-end data analysis and ML modeling project for a pharmaceutical company. Covers sales trend analysis, pricing dynamics, and predictive models for forecasting future revenue and price points. Includes interactive dashboard components designed for stakeholder consumption.

Time Series ↗
Walmart Weekly Sales Forecasting
Capstone project forecasting weekly department-level sales across Walmart stores. Advanced feature engineering with holiday effects, markdown data, and store metadata. Full model benchmarking across ARIMA and SARIMAX

Classification ↗
Red Wine Quality Prediction
ML classification models predicting wine quality from physicochemical properties. Full EDA, feature importance analysis, and multi-class model comparison including Random Forest and XGBoost with performance visualization.

Mall Customer Segmentation
Unsupervised K-Means clustering segmenting 200 mall customers into 5 distinct behavioral groups by income, spending score, age, and demographics — surfacing actionable marketing personas.

EDA · Market Analysis ↗
Albany Airbnb Market Analysis
Exploratory data analysis of Airbnb listings in Albany, NY — investigating pricing patterns, availability trends, neighborhood-level dynamics, and host behavior to surface strategic insights for hosts and travellers.
